game_start_scene.title: Living room
game_start_scene.text:
A normal day around 2pm, you are watching TV and scrolling on your phone whilst the snow falls gently outside.
 Your peace is broken by a shy knock on your front door.

main_game_hallway_1.title: Hallway
main_game_hallway_1.text: A tall and slender but cute man stands at your front door behind him, down the path, a car with a dented fender. 'Sorry miss' - foreign, British maybe, 'my car.. I'm not used to such conditions..' he trails off, his clothes are sodden from where he attempted to repair his car. 'I've called someone out, but given the weather it could be a while, is there any chance to loiter around your place?' Oh yes, he is going to make your perfect subsmissive slave this weekend

Leave him out there whilst you change into something... fresher

main_game_hallway_1_hard_option_kitchen_.text: On the way to the kitchen you see your sleeping pills on the side table, pick them up?

hard_option_bedroom_1_reversed.text: 'Let's get you out of the clothes though, I'm sure I have something upstairs', you start leaving and gesture for him to follow you, before heading out and turning to the stairs. Pausing a couple of seconds and he emerges following you.
